buildCommand: mkdir -p public/supabase && cp index.html styles.css app.js supabase-config.js public/ && cp supabase/supabase-client.js public/supabase/ && (cp pepili.png public/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp pepili-smile.png public/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp ff-enhance.js public/ 2>/dev/null || true)
